name: Verification Path Executor
when_to_use: Понимает verification_path из контракта и умеет запускать нужные тесты, линтеры, smoke steps, coverage, security scans и ручные checklists.
Seed rationale: Отделяет «код написан» от «работа доказана».
inputs: Поддержка приоритетов: fastest relevant tests first -> full targeted suite -> smoke. Должен логировать exact commands, outputs, artifacts and failures.
steps: TBD: convert the seed build spec into a stable step-by-step skill contract.
stop_conditions: TBD: define success and stop boundaries before runtime consumption.
escalation_rules: Escalate when the required source-of-truth inputs are missing, contradictory, or blocked by a human-owned zone.
anti_patterns: Do not duplicate always-on repo guidance inside selective skills.
Do not silently widen role scope beyond the owning skill pack.
denied_actions: Do not treat this skeleton metadata as runtime-ready execution logic before the later runtime-consumption blocks.
description: Понимает verification_path из контракта и умеет запускать нужные тесты, линтеры, smoke steps, coverage, security scans и ручные checklists.
build_spec: Поддержка приоритетов: fastest relevant tests first -> full targeted suite -> smoke. Должен логировать exact commands, outputs, artifacts and failures.
source_refs: source/Маршруты в зависимости от разных задач.md#11
